flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Belmont College fell 64% between 2006 and 2009 (27.1% → 9.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Belmont College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Belmont College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 (486 → 600).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Belmont College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 58.5%).
